top_signals.title: Software stocks got crushed. Did they have it coming?
top_signals.summary: The market may be overreacting to AI risks faced by software companies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Canadian spy agency reports hacking three criminal groups in 2025
top_signals.summary: A ransomware-as-a-service gang, an online foreign extremist group and drug traffickers were separately the targets of offensive operations in 2025, according to Canada's Communications Security Establishment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Waller, Two Thoughts on the Transmission of Monetary Policy
top_signals.summary: Speech At "Challenges for Monetary Policy Transmission in a Changing World," a conference sponsored by the Bank of Italy for the research network initiated by the European System of Central Banks, Rome, Italy

top_signals.title: German Oil Stocking Agency Says It’s Refilling Strategic Reserve - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: German Oil Stocking Agency Says It’s Refilling Strategic Reserve  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japanese anime's production costs jump as global viewership booms
Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
top_signals.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.
